## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Package(s) Affected

- [ ] `@meeting-ai/shared`
- [ ] `@meeting-ai/bot-runner`
- [ ] `@meeting-ai/ai-backend`
- [ ] CI/CD workflows
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

## For Shared Package Changes

> ⚠️ Changes to `@meeting-ai/shared` require review from **BOTH** team members

- [ ] I have discussed these changes with the other team member
- [ ] API contracts remain backward compatible (or breaking changes are documented)
- [ ] Both `bot-runner` and `ai-backend` tests pass with these changes
